zh.Edwardstone, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可艾德沃德斯同
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Munchensy於大約1100年出生在英國素福爾可艾德沃德斯同時，她的父親Hubert de Munchensy36歲，母親Muriel de Valoignes14歲。她於1124年與William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年12月在英國素福爾可易沃斯享年76歲。

zh-hans.Edwardstone, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可艾德沃德斯同
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Munchensy于大约1100年出生在英国素福爾可艾德沃德斯同时，她的父亲Hubert de Munchensy36岁，母亲Muriel de Valoignes14岁。她于1124年与William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1175年12月在英国素福爾可易沃斯享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Munchensy was born about 1100, in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England, her father, Hubert de Munchensy, was 36 and her mother, Muriel de Valoignes, was 14. She married William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth in 1124, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in December 1175, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Munchensy est née environ 1100, à Edwardstone, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hubert de Munchensy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Valoignes, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth en 1124, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1175, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Munchensy um 1100 in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hubert de Munchensy 36 und ihre Mutter Muriel de Valoignes 14. Sie hat 1124 in England William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1175 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Ixworth, Suffolk, England.

Lei sposato William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth nel 1124, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1175, nel Ixworth, Suffolk, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Munchensyが約1100年にイギリススフォルクエドワードストーンで生まれた時，父Hubert de Munchensyは36歳，母Muriel de Valoignesは14歳であった。1124年にイギリスでWilliam le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年12月にイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで76歳で死去した。

ko.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 드 압잉던 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Munchensy(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 수폴크 에드워스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hubert de Munchensy(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel de Valoignes(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1124년 영국에서 William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 12월 영국 수폴크 이스워스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Munchensy nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Edwardstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hubert de Munchensy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Muriel de Valoignes, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth em 1124, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1175, em Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: олд абингдон эбби, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Munchensy родилась около 1100 г. в местности эдвардстоун, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Hubert de Munchensy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Valoignes, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth в 1124 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1175 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Munchensy nació aproximadamente 1100, en Edwardstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hubert de Munchensy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Muriel de Valoignes, tenía 14 años. Se casó con William le Blount 3rd Baron Of Ixworth en 1124, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1175, en Ixworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
